title: Mackenzie Roofing
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Deidre Peacock","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTaMAJlmd88UH314AP_I09esnibxf-HQ8MJ9mgAXCD4i2itA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Called Mackenzie Roofing for an estimate for our flat roof. We were changing from a tar and gravel to a torch on roof. I found that they had great customer service, were quick with an estimate and ensured all my questions were answered. They were more affordable than some of the other estimates we had, used quality product, and the final bill was right on par with the quote. They added a down spout and changed the rusted gutter systems and still came in at the quote price and left the place clean and tidy. I would definitely recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Candace Beech","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXS35KQpVVXrGBfL5aYs05O93ge-Km_Ymk9cznyhSP19uD08iu8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mackenzie Roofing did a wonderful job on my roof. To top that, his pricing was very reasonable. I completely recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Barococo Contracting Ltd.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Rich Dueck Vlogs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUy5GFAtRHMYvigjbtthX4nqToqvuIeskV1QkrUMrTrFLcDWkcD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had this company come over to inspect my roof to see if it needed Replacing at this time.Braydon Crawled all over the roof and inside the attic and inspected and did some minor repairs that he felt were required. My roof is 30 years old and I thought he was for sure He was going to Try to sell me a new roof. After his inspection, he said I should monitor it every year but at this point he felt There was no need to replace it yet. I would highly recommend this company as I feel that they are very honest and trustworthy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bruce izard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJc9i0ifWYGksoQSnwwl3x_2R5Wu71FkEbuu0oRM7sVC_YdLA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Barococo replaced our roof during a 3 day window of good weather in November. They offered a reasonable estimate and communicated well before, during and after the installation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tom Shaw","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrz739nv2cvM4EBmnNIoUD0GzjlTXn2O7NwBmG1FrM8QB71gs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Barococco is a 17th century Italian word for structures built with “quality and precision”. This is the mission statement of these men and that is what they will bring to you.

Having Barococco redo my roof last summer, I can guarantee they will give you a fair price and quality work. They are professionals who will communicate carefully to ensure they understand your needs and work towards providing exactly (precisely) what will be best for you.

I strongly recommend you consider Barococco and invite them to discuss your project and experience the “quality and precision” they promise to deliver.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAK3RVpRbbeYtxE2ucFPklC&fid=0x0:0x574c9e59a0c818bf"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"Ian Kristensen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXK8EPogAnS1_sBeU4zUR8jKxdgsjTf-62FdpzJ3Di1NctGBkA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We highly recommend Barococo Roofing! They did an awesome job and you couldn't ask for a nicer more professional crew to do your roof. Ty was great with communication when we were pricing the job and always kept in contact. They were on time, performed the work quickly, and did an amazing job of cleaning up afterwards. They also provided us with a complete report of the work they did, with photos of everything. Thanks Ty and crew!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENuDxZygq5uIVQ&fid=0x0:0x574c9e59a0c818bf"],"When":"2025-5-10"},{"Name":"Brad Porteous","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZVjXkirOtEHytcsC5uEdSEXXvIrvyi9lQ5lSSoU1NtJEuj64=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Barococo Contracting. I’m not one to give reviews often. The communication excellent, Email response excellent, Workmanship excellently performed. I’m a regular guy that appreciates quality work at a reasonable price.
The owners are polite understanding. The job site was kept clean and safe. Everyday after working all nails and roofing scraps were picked up. These are hard working young men. I would surely recommend Barococo to anyone looking to get their roof done. Thanks guys for doing a great job. Keep doing what you do. Milt and Elizabeth","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Haida Fortier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV64RCjuYKKO2YTteAUNFWTX_L1awPQl1DwI7dwy8PF9sJLTtpx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super professional company! Spoke to Jordan about this many times over  many months and there was always an excuse, finally in Aug 2024 Modern windows provided solex with a quote which required a 50% deposit - Solex never paid.
We went through the Civil Resolution Tribunal and were given a default decision (as Solex did not respond to the Tribunal)

They even sent a guy over to tarp the old, leaky roof before a big rainstorm just to be nice.    We are very happy with him, his crew and the final product, no complaints!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Derek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzfH2oBfbi7ZbJ-5xeNmqbiMuNn6jk-ifrG6-hytcuL4Km_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kevin and his incredible team just finished roofing our seaside complex in two days!  Right from the beginning Kevin arrived promptly and identified several issues with our roof (some of which had been observed by other contractors/inpsectors and some of which hadn't:  an eye for detail!) and offered his professional advice.  Throughout the process,  Kevin was patient with all of our questions and concerns and addressed them professionally.  Had many quotes from many companies but in the end he was offering the exact same products as a competitor but for a more competitive price.
He also has outstanding Google reviews and is recognized by the Better Business Bureau!  Humbly confident and super competent!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"walter levesque","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiGL2dSJmnGIEZ8Yxu4B7unVr_t8w9k3GCjzD3a29ogK3wcSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Robbins Roofing Team just completed our roof replacement and only one word describes the overall experience, "EXCEPTIONAL"!  Overwhelmed with finding a top tier roofing company we were fortunate to have a neighbour who recently contracted Kevin and had nothing but praise, so Robbins' moved to the top of the list. The Robbins Team are to be commended for their professionalism, attention to detail and awesome demeanor. During the project they addressed issues concerning ventilation, sheathing replacement, flashing and carried out all necessary repairs without delay. On completion a thorough ground and gutter cleanup was carried out including a post-debrief with pics. Kevin and his crew of skilled trades-people are of the highest calibre and deserving of all the posted accolades. Many thanks to the Robbins Roofing Team. Walt & Pam / Courtenay","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tallis Hobbs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSK5s3fRQsMx6w9VgqMdYs4xHdVpsbpRQfB4w2JTYLlmHQBw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I first reached out to Kevin 18 months ago to ask about my roof. It was 22 years old, I had just moved in, and I was sure it needed replacing. I was pretty surprised when his advice was to hold off for another year or two, as—aside from one spot—it was in pretty good shape. Old, but still good enough.

Kevin and his crew replaced our asphalt roof in early December 2024. They were great to work with—super respectful, quick, and efficient. Since I know nothing about roofs, I had a lot of questions, and Kevin was happy to walk me through the process, pointing out what I should be looking for in a roof. I also really appreciated how, when they were done, my yard was cleaner than when they arrived. There was no evidence of garbage or debris from the shingles they removed.

A few days after they finished, we had a significant rainfall. Inside, we noticed a patch of discoloration on the ceiling. I couldn’t tell Kevin with any confidence if it had been there before or not, as we’d only been in the house for 18 months—and honestly, we had never noticed it. Either way, two members of his crew showed up within the hour, scaled the roof in the rain, checked the attic, inspected the ceiling, and conducted a thorough investigation to ensure the issue wasn’t caused by any post-replacement leaks.

The point is, I really appreciated Kevin’s honesty. He was always quick to respond and transparent when answering questions. I’d recommend him to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jayson Fuerstenberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYu3hC9AWiUnbBAaey3a-Jik01fU2CUl51beuA8imagajYIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Robbins Roofing & Contracting was referred to us by another roofing company. They slotted us in very quickly after calling and were punctual every day. Started as 7:30 am sharp! They did a quick but professional job. Removed our old roof, cleaned it all up, lay down new underlay and put on new shingles. Communication was replied to quickly and any issues we had were dealt with right away. They even came back after the job to help us with a gutter issue. They did all of this for what I feel was a very fair price. I have recommended to my neighbours and would highly recommend to anyone else.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Kingfisher Pacific Resort and Spa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSUGcGeo2gvX7JHqXMlv1xjPZFbwlTi5ScbVRLZ1VUbKmMUc8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We would highly recommend Lacasse Construction Ltd. for any construction or renovation projects. Our resort, the Kingfisher Pacific Resort & Spa, recently underwent a significant renovation, and we had the pleasure of working closely with their team throughout the entire process.

From the initial planning stages to the final completion of the project, Lacasse consistently demonstrated professionalism, expertise, and a strong commitment to quality. Their attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines, all while maintaining high standards, greatly exceeded our expectations.

The team worked efficiently and effectively to minimize any disruptions to our daily operations, ensuring that our guests were not inconvenienced during the renovation. Their communication was excellent, keeping us informed of progress and addressing any concerns promptly. It was clear that they took great pride in their work and were committed to delivering outstanding results.
Thanks to Lacasse, our resort now boasts beautiful, modernized rooms that enhance our guests’ experiences.

Their craftsmanship, project management skills, and dedication to customer satisfaction were truly impressive.

We would not hesitate to work with Lacasse again in the future and highly recommend them to anyone seeking a reliable and skilled construction partner.

Aaron Greasley
General Manager
Kingfisher Pacific Resort & Spa","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI4fLdOg&fid=0x0:0xb56f4e07402a10ce"],"When":"2025-4-2"},{"Name":"martha Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJi6puB60L0y1YDr3bqvU8Juj82hzXQbr_cJiBWoOBRt-krw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lacasse Construction is an excellent company to work with. Over the last three years collaborating with them -  from the planning to designing to the building to the finishing - I found that every single person on their team are talented, helpful and hard working. They are reliable and easy to communicate with, plus they always had some creative suggestions to add the mix. It was a pleasure doing business with them, and I truly hope to be able to work with them again for my next construction project. I highly recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carol Coupland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7LXsgfm-8aDmdX2HtpSFHPKORHO52xvm3VfWeCgRYZzoUmWGdAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Lacasse construction seems to be good at final construction results however their process and consideration for local neighbours during construction leaves a lot to be desired.
A long term project on an apartment building has been noisy which is understandable and they do follow bylaws around noise etc. what they don’t do is respond to neighbours complaints about leaving ugly equipment hanging over communal hedges that become eyesores for backyard landscapes. The property under construction has an extremely large parking lot and surrounding area where this equipment can be parked when not in use. After a formal complaint in writing to the foreman the equipment was relocated for about 2 days before it was in the same spot once more. A second piece of equipment was added to hang over the hedge view. So as if the noise for the past several months wasn’t enough the added ugly site is added. Photos are attached and my latest requests to park them elsewhere (10 feet away behind the apartment building) have been ignored. Such lovely community spirit! Seems minor however annoying when viewed from our windows EVERY DAY and sitting outside to enjoy our yard and gardens is a thing of the past!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwybunjAE&fid=0x0:0xb56f4e07402a10ce"],"When":"2025-3-26"},{"Name":"Teri Norfolk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmgg7zZ3CtFJBDlbN7CrqzLFsbOhvpF1iSWzlLJiGOU0EtXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If I could give 6 stars for Lacasse Construction I would!  I have done many projects with them over the last 10 years, both residential and commercial.  Each and every time I have had not only extraordinary service but  every one of the crew members have become like family.  They are friendly, polite, tidy and considerate.  But most of all they are highly skilled!!  They are willing to tackle any project and can overcome any challenge.  It seems that nothing is impossible.  Weekly updates and post construction walk throughs ensure that everything runs smoothly and has been executed with excellence.
I can wholeheartedly recommend Lacasse for any projects you may have.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Meg Barker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJC8CfLb1iYf_NrnXq-bqXy7nxd6SPQRY5_LUevmwhVLWSAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lacasse Construction built my house, which was finished about a year ago, and I could not be more thrilled with the results. The entire process, from design and estimating, through the construction phase, to post-construction follow-up was smooth and efficient. The project was completed within budget and a month ahead of schedule.

Lacasse has a top notch team: conscientious and very professional support staff, talented tradespeople and innovative problem-solvers. Cale, Ben and Ryan were an absolute pleasure to work with. Creative. Detail-oriented. Extremely professional. They care about quality and it shows.

The worksite was always left clean and tidy at the end of each day. The crews were courteous to the neighbours, and although I was only able to visit the site about once a month, I was kept in the loop with weekly on-line team meetings, which I really appreciated.

My house is a unique design with unconventional construction materials and innovative features. Lacasse Construction did a phenomenal job. I’d hire them again in a heartbeat.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Todd Deters","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyEwMLH3hssDWkRskkbiu9WAIxjVECZW4OZOY0ktWBAVE4Mw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience with Lacasse was fantastic. Lacasse came to the aid of my business after an accident that damaged the building substantially. They arrived on the scene with a team and quickly formulated a plan .

In each step of a lengthy process Lacasse provided weekly updates and progress reports. There was also an estimation of what would be completed the following week. Each time they met their goals. Each and every contractor that was involved in the scope of repair work was on time and exceptionally courteous to the staff of our store and any customers encountered.

There was a foreman on site each day early to make sure things were underway and any unanticipated issues could be met and worked around .

Lacasse also went above and beyond creating an incased insulated work area inside the store so we could work with clients while the repairs continued. This helped reduce noise and dust making a much quicker return to the business being operational. This was done on short notice to allow for the store to reopen for holiday season business.

I was able to interact with Lacasse’s team on a daily basis, each and every time it was a pleasant experience and even a learning opportunity about how things were done.

I would recommend the Lacasse team for a construction project. From the initial consultation to the billing and clean up was done with explanation and care.

Thank you Lacasse for the work you did for us at Design Therapy Inc. it was a large job that you took care of with ease and professionalism.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Justine Sanders","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-xKg1wweS9pnuofW-7D9Rb_UsvV4vjM71Hu933IwI6nR9-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cale, Lief, Stephen and the full crew at Lacasse were incredibly professional, responsive, friendly and efficient.  We are thrilled with the end results and how they brought our dream pharmacy to life. Would recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jocelyn Beyak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7dFQDlCbazM806FwVinOWgBQHvXUnpYEcI-JiDwKFavaUnhthvg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Words cannot describe how impressed I am with Lacasse Construction. Not only did they build our dental clinic through COVID supply chain issues, rocketing lumber prices and heat waves but they did it all with humour, grace and honesty.
Lacasse was even able to step in and help us with a number of surprises. No matter what the issue big or small, if Lacasse was taking lead on it, I never had any worries.
Thank you to Cale, Hailey and Alejandro for such an exceptional experience.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Its always a seamless and professional experience collaborating with a builder who takes such pride in thier work and consistently delivers exceptional results.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gail Nasadyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ3S7p1KRRM2GWyWYX05vkeGSE1IYkzUITAxw8zvfL_3cAonQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hello Garry and the Monterra team

Just a thank you. We have been in our new home since May of 2022. 3256 Majestic Drive.

We moved from beautiful Seal Bay where we raised our three boys from 1975 to adult hood.

It was just getting too much for us to keep up. And just in time as my husband was diagnosed with that horrible disease, Alzheimers.

The lot and garden plan you chose is so very ideal. Low upkeep  (we are still able to do our own yard work etc.) and it is close to all of the amenities.

The contract was in such impeccable detail (the products, the cost, the consultation) nothing was a surprise.It was all in black and white.

For the house plan it must have intuited what we as seniors needed.  Because there isn’t a day goes by without me feeling grateful and satisfied we chose Monterra as our contractors.

It seemed our needs were known.

I entertain friends and family regularly and do my own house work etc. and the ease of the up keep is never a problem because of the choice of the layout.

I think I can/will keep up for many more years to come.

Going over the plan, Garry was always receptive to changes that I suggested. For example we were able to add extra cupboard space in the laundry room for our linens, towels etc.

When I suggested spending less on closet racks and storage he made it clear I would not be unhappy with what was chosen even though more expensive. He was right and I thank him for that.

The sky light in the suite adds to the decor beautifully and the extra large patio facing the 8th freeway makes it so easy to entertain our friends, kids and grandkids with meals and activities.

I love this home. It suits us beautifully for our life style  and we would not mind showing it, if interested.

My driveway and the patio were just power washed this July 2025. I asked Monterra about doing the sealing. They responded promptly. Garry sent Jared, his son, to give a quote.

Also, when roof tiles  were damaged by golf balls I emailed Monterra and they gave me a contact person to call. I was called and the damage was fixed in a very short time for a very small cost.

We are very thankful we chose Monterra as our contractors. And we recommend them highly.

George and Gail Nasadyk, forever thankful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Beacom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKo3vwssVz7TPT-UNEF_vxLNUC_mE9g1WgmgcdJgxRT2BLk3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were lucky enough to find and purchase a Montera home 3 years ago(second owner),built in 2016.Fast forward to 3 weeks ago and found a leak with our roof overhang,called numerous(3) local roofers and got the old run around and ghosting.Out of frustration I reached out to Montera to see if they could recommend someone.Amazingly they swung into action and we had a roofer that very day,who sorted our problem.Absolutely amazing service,we love our home that Montera built and couldn’t recommend them enough,special thank you to Jared for the follow up and being on point.Thank you again John Beacom","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Travis Saccucci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFrirlPukb8IlaAllF_4mNA2u9iXjatkCidcu3z5KqvPTRgIw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After years of planning, designing and looking for the perfect piece of vacant property we started the search for a builder. After consulting with a few local companies we chose Monterra West Homes as their style and personality was the perfect match to ours. The entire process from our initial consultation right down to receiving the keys upon completion was positive. Garry Renkema and his entire team delivered an end product that we are very proud of. Our project manager Calvin’s attention to detail was second to none. No detail was over looked throughout the entire build. Both Garry and Calvin responded to any and all correspondence in a timely manner. If you are looking for an honest, high quality, professional builder in the Comox Valley we would highly recommend Monterra West Homes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Dorion","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMttaN_-V__ts-yPZslo0mq4E52FynPfl_jAI8y_poF2Eipu8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a first time home buyer, Monterra made the process very easy to  understand and the quality of the build is everything I was hoping to see. I'm extremely happy with the home, and would vouch for Monterra anytime as a reliable and transparent developer in the Valley. The responsiveness of  the onsite staff was always punctual and professional, and would go above and beyond when any comment / criticism was made to correct whatever the issue at hand was.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"kevin burke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLILxI6NXAMZZ1Hqbszut8WSjhTgh_ntJDLL7Aj4Tg6stqcVA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Myself and Ayesha have had a great experience in dealing with our first home purchase from Monterra West Homes .From the outset when we first viewed the development and in particular the show home on a Saturday afternoon , we were very impressed with the work ethic of the owner and his crew who were diligently getting through the tasks of the day to get everything ready for potential customers and existing clients . Consequently we knew that if we went ahead with the purchase  we were in good hands .After deciding to buy , all the communication we have had throughout the process has been done in a professional and timely manner by Monterra and our closing date for handover was met with all of the expectations . We are very happy with our well built , bright and modern home .We would happily recommend Monterra West Homes to anyone purchasing a new home .! Kevin Burke","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"CV Landlord","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcRXBr9dhIG8VM6SCcBCG0nAFxRBT4JOHR_i9sNfxwhYjJy1U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"All I can say is amazing.  Beyond our expectations.  The quality of the townhouse inside and out is fabulous.  From start to finish the Monterra team could not have been more helpful and accommodating.  All of the workers were super polite, and always showed up with a smile on their faces.  I continually walk around and say, wow, this place is so beautiful.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Katie Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0k788MC0tXFTVsyQ-s1qLeeCqzIo4KilhklYzsg3XaMb_p4xt4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was given Matthew's name by my Godfather George. Matthew installed his metal roof in 2019. George had gotten Matthew's name from a friend and was highly impressed with Matthew's demeanor and work ethic. I hired Matthew for a full shingle roof replacement in 2025. Matthew is lovely to work with; quiet spoken,  unassuming, efficient. His estimates came in very close to his invoices. (We actually got a refund on materials) Matthew keeps his equipment and work site tidy. I was most pleased with his work and would highly recommend him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brian Chapman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSTZxWQ1VuDxeyX4kFBbWwLMwaIbJNQ33KjmkWLueb_-TI4w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Matthew did a fantastic job installing our copper finish steel roof. He worked long days including a holiday to get the job done super quickly, and even got it done below estimate! We had contacted several other roofers who wouldn’t even answer emails or phone calls to get an estimate and we’re  glad that they didn’t so we could get the right roofer, Matthew!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cody Kolenchuk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcOCWCMNDUOojPUd_H6vqa-xDhlcjS3JHAY7_Jy1gOVqT63w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I woke up to discover water dripping on my range from a leaky roof port. Matthew fit me in to have it fixed and did an excellent job. He explained what he found and how he completed the repair. We’ve used Islander twice now and highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"anniestar gwood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxW7Ykp4MB0Wv3nwz2ElybaoEJfB7r3FYYsiWoHPd5obnPpg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My metal-roofed sunroom was leaking so badly, but I was nervous about finding a good roofer because I've often found that they don't really listen to women.  I'm SO HAPPY that I called Islander Roofing!!  They came and listened respectfully and after Matthew investigated, he and Shelby took pictures as they went, and showed me and explained how it had been improperly installed.  They did their repairs, they were so nice and so helpful.
If you want to work with people who listen to you and who explain their repair plan, and who are really good people, I think you should call them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dan Marchant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRnmUV4LZxf4C47xg9ql-BIrUxNY1qkYKHXy9te_yQgcyaywJ1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So we have a tin roof that needs remedial work every few years. Not a big expensive/glamorous job but important to keep the roof in good shape for years to come.

Having been messed around by another company for several months we contacted Islander Roofing. They were responsive, they turned up to do the work; they did it in two days and we now have a roof that is good to go for another 5-10 years.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Margaret Pollitt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvLQ9VLolFTwOzumlYH2Cy-dv_RvTmCaS4Ey5ntayxMwhLiA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great company to deal with, excellent service, very professional. I had skylights and a small roof replaced in a very timely manner. Very pleased with their workmanship. Their quotes are broken down into materials and labour so you clearly see what you are paying for. Great communication and a very tidy clean up at the end. I would highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jonathan Grabb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQDH7h5TnuKw1yfbADub_SBfo7z5OS8lWplW_5f9cMsHGzgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are so pleased with Islander Roofing! We initially called Islander Roofing to repair an unexpected leak in our home's wood siding. They quickly repaired the job for a cost far less then what we anticipated. With this demonstrated great service, we hired them back again for a custom soffit installation of our entire home several months later. They were knowledgeable about soffit materials that met the esthetic we were going for. They provided billing estimates and equipment rental information up front so there were no surprises. They were on time and worked several long days, despite a heat wave, to ensure the most efficient use of rental equipment needed for our job. Communication with them was effortless as they returned all emails/phone calls in quick order. We were never left in the dark about any decisions with our project. They were always friendly and approachable on the job site as well which further reassured us that we had hired the right company for this project. They were tidy as they worked and their final cleanup of their work area left no trace of them ever being there! They present as honest, transparent and trustworthy professionals which is so refreshing these days. They did an excellent job from start to finish and we would highly recommend Islander Roofing to all needing roofing/siding/soffit/gutter work completed. Thank you Shelby and Matthew!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"coryberg2","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTQ5KMQqLCctURiJA8ow8SirNSWQQd_nDar26lltMN_NkZUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing service and very good rates!

Had a leak through my bathroom vent on a stormy Sunday. Emailed Islander roofing the next day and although they were busy they put me on the list and promised they would try to get to me quickly. They definitely weren't lying, I was very surprised when they contacted me to come take a look so soon. They squeezed me in at the end of the work week and got it all fixed up before our next big storm cycle comes. Will definitely recommend this company to anyone who needs it.

Cheers!","Images":null,"When":""}]

After multiple visits to “repair” the incorrectly sealed roof, none of which resolved the issues, the owner began ignoring my father’s calls.

My father is recovering from a severe and life-altering injury, and watching his morale plummet throughout this ordeal has been especially disheartening, given how excited he was about the original product before its inadequacies became clear. I have tried to fix the issues myself, but I am no professional, nor do I have any idea where these panels are supposed to be secured.

Before the owner stopped responding, he claimed that part of the roof they had installed was attached to an area of the house that had already been leaking. However, one of the deck ceilings they constructed entirely from scratch is also leaking, and at a much more dramatic rate.

At this point, we are likely going to contract someone else to patch or properly redo the work, as the monsoon season is approaching and the leaks are already damaging the house’s interior. That said, if DHI were to reach out and help us finally resolve this issue, I would be more than satisfied to strike this from the record and leave it at that.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIok5KVrMerxyuqqeGM-xL&fid=0x0:0x793f73f81a7aa9d"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Kathy Haigh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzbA7Q9-h8KMFTTBd5RBJizSX9-vw9W0DfWig_hpvos0Rj9SE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After getting estimates and ideas from 2 other companies, I hired Dalron/Steve to install an aluminium roof over my patio. Final invoice was exactly as estimated. Steve even offered solutions for trellising the existing grapevine at a corner of the patio. A pleasure hiring local people who provide excellent workmanship and a fair price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDWraPYOw&fid=0x0:0x793f73f81a7aa9d"],"When":"2022-3-31"},{"Name":"K Dogg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGBp60qzntoujK2RXIru1HVpo9-isxx_QThL0U2qVvJgsPwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First class operation. I will absolutely be recommending him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deniz Akin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6Jxqg5upRSxC98x6sKz1A_3B-ZZ_fplcjsBrJ3kw0wV788uQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The owner told me in October that the job would happen in November. That time came and went and I had to reach out for updates on timeline. The work was eventually done satisfactorily in January. The crew never offered a walkthrough upon completion of the work so I politely requested a chance to have a look when I was sent the bill. My request to inspect the work received the following response:

"I agree, totally reasonable for you to look at the work on your time promptly, but our time costs money so not a reasonable request to withhold a payment so you can with all due respect do an uneducated inspection of the roof.  I can come and pick up cheque on Friday and put a ladder up for you to take a look

Thanks

title: Lifetime Exteriors
open_hours: {"Friday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Monday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Tuesday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Wednesday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jaclyn Bates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcF1XU3U9fF458fV6oWds5uNlOI2ppNBBaPxKZ9HT3mBc-Cg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We needed a cover on our patio to keep the rain (and pine needles) out of our livingroom which connects directly to the upper patio. I contacted Lifetime Exteriors along with a few other companies to get estimates.

Rob replied promptly to my request for an estimate and scheduled an in-home estimate within a few days. Rob was friendly, knowledgeable and great to communicate with, answering all of my questions and suggesting the right products for my needs.

The pricing was competitive and actually slightly less than another company who was offering the same product. When I asked for different post-bracket options , Rob consulted with Mark who also followed up quickly providing an explanation and pics of the brackets I wanted. They adjusted the estimate with the different brackets which ended up being less expensive. Right there I knew this was a company with integrity and decided to proceed as a result.

Installation was estimated at 5 weeks however, they installed within just over a week of paying the deposit. Mark installed the cover along with another installer. They showed up on time, confirmed the details of the job and got to work. Installation took 2 hours and the finished product is exactly what we wanted and looks great!

If you want to deal with a Canadian business who has great customer service and communication, is friendly and does quality work I’d recommend Lifetime Exteriors.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBTh2YqKeWpW7_5VWIIFuVK&fid=0x0:0x3ac3a424a10b4286"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Robert Sharman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4Dr1_mzxugYb46tuoRxFW29YSKGCKSxn7uMcjjMm-ejrQWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have a comparison to the work of Lifetime. I needed awnings on the west side to help manage heat in summer - for my home on Gabriola. I initially ‘worked’ with a company out of Vancouver, that never followed through in a timely manner, was confusing to deal with - and kept proposing very expensive and complicated solutions. Fortunately Chloe of Budget Blinds out of Campbell River told me she kept seeing Lifetime’s Vehicles. I reached out - and what a difference! Initial conversation was excellent. Mark truly listened. He soon came all the way out Gabriola to measure and consult. Again, strong communications. Indeed most impressively, he recommended less expensive options as he learned my priorities. We agreed on the sizing and style. There was a question about mounting given the Cedar Siding. We got him matching siding and the stain - and he manufactured a way to mount that is seamless and blends perfectly with the house. Finally, after giving me a clear timeline for manufacturing the awnings and when installation would be likely - they delivered and installed about 10 days early. Under promise and over deliver! I met both Mark and Rob - and they are good communicators and just nice people. Very pleased to say thank you through this review.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICDp4iNQA&fid=0x0:0x3ac3a424a10b4286"],"When":"2024-4-2"},{"Name":"Doug Allen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5EH9H6HX1Bdk2eC-0VD6zLFq4mqtOuukJdAVI7C17hYaY3A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great company and extremely happy with the quality of workmanship.  They fit us into their very busy schedule and completed the job as estimated and on time.  Highly recommended this company.
Doug","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ted Giraldeau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2taserBpDyDPoriPDX31AJaS3iGU-00DiLoPSBqt1W_BGYA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are extremely happy with our whole experience working with Lifetime Exteriors. Mark is great to work with. Besides being a fun guy, he provided timely communication and was very quick with the install (within 2 weeks of our order). The finished patio cover looks great and is all the rave with our friends (some have even ordered their own cover). The price point was much lower than other companies we checked and the quality of service and product was as good as if not better. We cannot say enough good things. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Law","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIpM8eelEVi9BAzd_B9QIHtbEuwTWF6lt84KHaeM_aq1tZxg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am very happy with the 4 retractable awnings installed by Mark and Richard of Lifetime Exterior Shades. The awnings are sturdy, attractive, functional and cranks smoothly. The price was very reasonable.  The communication was clear and the installation was done promptly with care.  I came across Lifetime Exterior after an expensive quote from one company and 2 other companies did not respond to my phone message until I had already purchased these awnings.  The product and service has exceeded my expectations so far.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"R L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjYmgAWD-SpakMWdIUw0P6chxP6_VdSnGvuiL1iIr-ZfZARA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing company, great communication, from initial order to installation day. Installers were friendly and very quick. Moved all patio furniture and placed back when done. The quality of the awning is excellent. Highly recommend Lifetime Exteriors, thanks Rob & Mark.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hannah Drover","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOZaWnAM1p1DaBO9Rm0E2p3xx60DnYmBJPBwtDyFmDPYqJfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rob gave us the initial quote for a new deck roof just days after he visited (which was days after I called!) then Mark came for the install, after visiting one time prior to scope it out. Communication was great, price fair and quality and form exactly what we were looking for. It’s turned out deck into another whole room! Highly recommended working with these guys, they’re pros.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Glen Doherty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaaPGJUOHF_e7KVsy0EHo_mT1-KZsaYTD_0n38ZEBaL7XDCg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great company and people to deal with!!  Professional,Quality product and install.  Rob gave me lots of great info over the phone, then Mark came to check the scope of work.  Install was completed  in a timely manner and with such expert skills and know how.  I would recommend  this company to anyone I know or don't know for that matter.","Images":null,"When":""}]
